home.title: Art-Labyrinth 2026
home.subtitle: The 2026 festival website is in progress
home.description: Program, participation details, logistics, gallery and all current information for the 2026 festival will appear here soon. For now you can return to the main site or open the 2025 festival archive.

about.title: About the Festival
about.text_1: Art-Labyrinth Summer Festival is an annual event founded in 2008. Each year we bring together people ready to unite in the pursuit of inspiration, creativity and mindfulness.
about.text_2: The festival takes place on the scenic banks of the Dniester River in Moldova. It is a space for transformation, exchange of ideas and inspiration, where art, music and nature merge in a single flow.
about.text_3: We bring together artists, musicians, craftspeople, volunteers and dreamers — everyone ready to create something great together.

contribute.title: Contribute

description.auth: Here you can purchase tickets for the 2026 festival. Choose the ticket type, specify the quantity and place the order. After payment, you will receive the ticket by email.
description.no_auth: Please sign in to purchase tickets for the 2026 festival.
